stages.objective: Observe baseline response profile before tuning.
stages.goal: Establish baseline trace and metric evidence for later comparison.
stages.theory_detail: Baseline measurement is required to justify tuning decisions.

hints.concept: Tuning without baseline makes improvement claims unreliable.
hints.explicit: Run default configuration and note response/completion metrics.

stages.objective: Diagnose response bottlenecks from baseline run.
stages.goal: Identify why current config misses or meets response target.

hints.concept: Response bottlenecks appear in early scheduling decisions.
hints.explicit: Compare first service times and confirm metric values before tuning.

stages.objective: Tune quantum/policy to hit response target under strict limits.
stages.goal: Meet response and completion checks while staying within policy-change budget.

hints.concept: Effective tuning improves target metric without breaking completion guarantees.
hints.explicit: Apply one change, rerun full workload, and submit only when all checks pass.
